headlines.title: Brad Lander projected winner in N.Y. Democratic primary for 10th Congressional district
headlines.description: NBC News’ Steve Kornacki analyzes former City Comptroller Brad Lander’s projected win in the Democratic primary for New York's 10th Congressional District. Lander defeated Democratic Rep. Dan Goldman, making Goldman the fifth House incumbent to lose a primary in 2026.

headlines.title: Trump touts falling gas prices as lawmakers pass war powers resolution
headlines.description: President Trump touted falling oil and gas prices from the preliminary peace deal with Iran in a midterm campaign swing in Pennsylvania. Plus, the Senate passed a symbolic resolution directing the President to end the war. NBC News’ Garrett Haake reports.

headlines.title: No resistió más: gol de Ante Budimir para Croacia y Panamá empieza a despedirse del Mundial 2026
headlines.description: La gran resistencia "canalera" duró 54 minutos, cuando tras una gran jugada croata, Stanisic metió el centro que se encontró al jugador de Osasuna, quien iba entrando solo para cerral la pinza y vencer al arquero Orlando Mosquera, pese a su lance.

headlines.title: ¡Doblete de Cristiano Ronaldo! Portugal amplía la goleada ante Uzbekistán
headlines.description: Portugal salió con velocidad al contragolpe y Bruno Fernandes filtró un gran pase para Cristiano Ronaldo. El capitán portugués definió al primer toque para firmar su doblete y alcanzar los 10 goles en la historia de los Mundiales.

headlines.title: Erling Haaland powers Norway into the next round and keeps pace in Golden Boot race
headlines.description: After tallying four goals in his first two World Cup games, the Manchester City striker is challenging Lionel Messi and Kylian Mbappé for the honor.

headlines.title: Miami welcomes Scotland fans and 'Tartan Army' ahead of World Cup match
headlines.description: NBC News' Jesse Kirsch reports from South Beach on Scottish fans taking over Miami ahead of Wednesday's Scotland vs. Brazil World Cup match.

headlines.title: Homeland Security is changing guidelines for Iran soccer team’s next match
headlines.description: A spokesperson said the department will allow Iran to travel to its next game location a day early.

headlines.title: Homeland Security is changing guidelines for Iran soccer team’s next match
headlines.description: A spokesperson said the department will allow Iran to travel to its next game location a day early.

headlines.title: Erling Haaland powers Norway into the next round and keeps pace in Golden Boot race
headlines.description: After tallying four goals in his first two World Cup games, the Manchester City striker is challenging Lionel Messi and Kylian Mbappé for the honor.

headlines.title: ‘Country Roads’ is taking the World Cup by storm
headlines.description: World Cup fans were united this weekend by a song synonymous with belonging, nostalgia and the yearning for home

headlines.title: Néstor Lorenzo: “Hicieron un partidazo los muchachos”
headlines.description: Néstor Lorenzo elogió la entrega de Colombia tras vencer 1-0 a RD del Congo. El DT destacó la movilidad, la seguridad y el gran trabajo del mediocampo, aunque reconoció que la Tricolor pudo marcar más diferencia.

headlines.title: La unión del Mundial entre Colombia y RD del Congo: Rivales en la cancha, hermanos en la tribuna
headlines.description: El partido entre Colombia y RD del Congo permanecía en ceros, pero los cafetaleros insistieron hasta que llegó el primer gol de la mano de Daniel Muñoz.
